name: MW19 Ghost Internal
detailedDescription:
• Spoofer Included
• Compatible with Windows 10 / Windows 11
• Controller Supported
• Supports Battle.net + Steam

• Aimbot: Silent Aim, 180° Toggle, Prediction, Humanization, Rapid Fire, Custom Keybinds, Bone Selection
• Anti Aim: Spinbot with Custom Keybind
• Targeting: Downed Check, Visibility Check, No Recoil, No Spread, No Shake, Adjustable Speed / FOV / Distance
• Override: Keybind Config + Aim Bone Override
• Visuals: FOV Circle, Snaplines, Names, Distance, Bone ESP, Box ESP, Health, Weapon ESP, Color Switching
• Unlocks: Unlock All + Reverse Camos
• Misc: Crash Server, Leave Match, Super Slide, Long Melee, Air Stuck, Chat Spam, 1000 FOV, No Stun / Flash
• Exploits: Class Editor, Operator Swapper, Dev Clantags, Custom Camos, Modded Weapons, Gesture Swapper
• Dvars (Battle.net Only): Third Person, FPS Boost, No Fog, Max Brightness, Motion Blur Toggle, Flash / Stun Disable

name: MW2/DMZ Grey Internal
detailedDescription:
• Advanced Aimbot System: Smooth customizable targeting, Silent Aim, Auto Fire, Sway Compensation, Adjustable FOV + Max Distance, Custom Activation Key
• Targeting: Bone Selection, FOV Priority, Distance Priority, Visibility Checks, Ignore Downed, Ignore Teammates, Ignore Bots, Ignore Bomb Drones
• ESP Categories: Enemy ESP, Team ESP, Bot ESP, World ESP (Bomb Drone Support)
• Enemy ESP: Box, Health, Skeleton, Names, Distance, Snaplines
• Team ESP: Box, Skeleton, Names, Distance, Snaplines
• Bot ESP: Box, Skeleton, Names, Distance, Snaplines
• World ESP: Bomb Drone ESP, Box, Names, Distance, Snaplines
• Visual Features: FOV Circle, Adjustable Render Distance, Visibility Filtering
• Weapon: No Recoil
• Camera / View: Spinbot, Third Person, Custom FOV
• Support: Controller Support + Spoofer Support
• Compatibility: Windows 10 / 11 (21H2–25H2)
• Customization: Custom ESP Colors, Feature Toggles, Adjustable Distance, Legit + Aggressive Playstyles
• Performance: Clean UI, Fast Menu, Minimal FPS Impact
• Security: Regular Updates, Secure Loader, Anti-Detection Measures
• Complete MW2 / DMZ All-in-One Solution

name: Progress External (MW2-BO7)
detailedDescription:
• Aimbot: Enable Aimbot, Mouse / Controller Aim Mode, Target Bone Selection, Adjustable FOV, Smoothness, Aim Key Bind, Target Priority, Prediction, Controller Aim Assist Strength
• Visuals (ESP): Enable ESP, Box ESP, Skeleton ESP, Player Names, Distance, Health Bar, Visible / Invisible Colors, AI / Player Filter
• Radar: Enable Radar, Adjustable Scale, Opacity, Enemy + Teammate Display, Direction Sync, Mobile Shared Radar (QR Code)
• Misc: No Recoil, No Spread, Triggerbot, Auto Reload, Hold Breath Assist, FPS Display
• Config: Save, Load, Delete, Auto Load Config
• Account: Username, Subscription Status, Remaining Time, HWID Status, Auth Server Status
• Settings: Menu Toggle Key, Language Switch, Theme Switch, Menu Opacity

name: Ancient ARC Raiders Cheat
detailedDescription:
• Aimbot: Enable, Aim Key, Mouse / Memory Aim Type, Adjustable Smoothness, Draw FOV, FOV Radius Slider, Prediction, Prediction Dot, Target Line
• Targeting: Target Lock, Visibility Check, Max Aim Distance Slider, Target Bone Selection
• Visuals: Name, Box, Skeleton, Squad, Distance (Visible + Invisible Colors), Health, Armor, Adjustable Max Distance

name: Ambani FiveM Chair
detailedDescription:

• Silent Aim / Magic Bullet: Magic Bullet, Bullet TP, Rage Silent, Silent FOV Ring, Bullet Curving, Auto Penetration, Backtrack, Lag Compensation, Silent Melee

• Vehicle Control: Drive on Water, Hover, Fly Mode, Nitro Boost, Spawn Vehicle, Invincible Vehicle, Auto Repair, Freeze, Lock / Unlock, Vehicle Gun, Remote Control

name: Temp Spoofer
detailedDescription:
• Azure Attestation / Ranked Bypass (Works Only on Select Motherboards)
• Spoofs: Disk Drives, Motherboard, TPM Endorsement Keys, Network MAC Addresses
• Confirmed Compatibility: COD, BF6, Fortnite, FiveM
• Note: Other games may also be supported, but compatibility has not yet been fully tested

name: Perm Spoofer
detailedDescription:
• Permanent HWID Spoofing (Universal)
• Temporary TPM Spoofing
• ASUS-Specific Spoofing Support
• Full Trace File Cleaner (Logs + Detection Cleanup)
• View Current HWID Information Before Spoofing
• Compatible with Major Platforms and Loaders
• Maintains Clean Sessions and Reduces Detection Risk
• Requirements: Realtek / Intel LAN Only, WMIC Installed, Secure Boot Disabled
• ASUS Boards Require spoof.exe Startup Entry Enabled
• HP / Dell Motherboards Not Supported
• Wireless Network Cards Not Supported (LAN Only)
